title: pelargonium abyssinicum
intro: Pelargonium abyssinicum, also known as African geranium or Abyssinian geranium, is a species of flowering plant in the family Geraniaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties that help in reducing fever and soothing sore throats. The health benefits of Pelargonium abyssinicum include its ability to relieve respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, and its potential to lower blood pressure and reduce anxiety. In herbal preparations, the leaves and flowers of the plant are typically used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
